title: The Positioning Debt Problem
description: A cinematic vertical video exposing how founders lose market share by ignoring positioning debt — and how to fix it with strategic narrative intelligence.

narrative.mission: Eliminate positioning debt for technical founders so their brilliance actually reaches the market.
narrative.villain: The curse of 'build it and they will come' — the silent killer of great products.
narrative.identityShift: From invisible builder to recognized authority.

scenes.title: The Hook
scenes.script: You built a product that could change your industry. But nobody knows it exists. That silence? It has a name. Positioning Debt.
scenes.visualPrompt: Dark cinematic opening. A lone founder at a desk surrounded by code, glowing monitor illuminating their face. Camera slowly pushes in. Text overlay fades in: 'POSITIONING DEBT'. Mood: dramatic, isolated.

scenes.title: The Villain
scenes.script: Every day you don't position yourself, someone less qualified takes your stage. They're not smarter. They're not better. They just understood one thing you didn't: visibility is a strategy, not a side effect.
scenes.visualPrompt: Split screen: On the left, our founder working in silence. On the right, a confident competitor on a podcast, on stage, going viral. Fast intercuts. Colors shift from cool blue (our founder) to warm gold (the competitor). Mood: tension, urgency.
scenes.bRollNotes: Show social media feeds scrolling with competitor content getting engagement

scenes.title: The Framework
scenes.script: At Authority Engine, we built a system that transforms your raw expertise into a cinematic content factory. No guesswork. No blank pages. Just your brilliance, architected into a strategic narrative that positions you as the undeniable authority.
scenes.visualPrompt: Transition to bright, clean interface showing the Authority Engine dashboard. Smooth UI animation of the 'Strategic Brain' being built — nodes connecting, patterns forming. Camera flies through the interface. Mood: empowering, technological, clean.

scenes.title: The Proof
scenes.script: From idea to finished video in under five minutes. Your voice. Your authority. Production quality that makes agencies jealous.
scenes.visualPrompt: Speed montage: typing a brief → AI generating narrative → visual storyboard appearing → final video playing on a phone in vertical format. Timer counting up from 0:00 to 4:47. Satisfying, fast-paced editing. Mood: awe, speed, capability.
scenes.bRollNotes: Show actual Authority Engine UI with real generation happening

scenes.title: The Call
scenes.script: Stop being the best-kept secret in your industry. Your expertise deserves an audience. Build your Authority Engine today.
scenes.visualPrompt: Our founder now standing confident, camera pulling back to reveal they're on stage, audience visible. Final frame: Authority Engine logo with CTA 'Build Your Authority'. Cinematic lens flare. Mood: triumphant, aspirational.
